Training & Support



About


Symbol B. Be Simple.

We're a Calgary startup focused on designing leading petroleum industry software solutions.

Our flagship PlannedWell™ desktop application is ready for your pad planning needs.

Contact us at Symbol B for your personalized demo!


Fracture Better

Design directional surveys and fracture placements easily for visualizing your pads and ensuring accurate spacing.

Plan Well

Effortlessly calculate spacing requirements to produce and check that your designs are being executed correctly.

Training & Support

Personalized training is provided to ensure you’re maximizing the use of our innovative software. PlannedWell™ is available for Windows, Mac, & Linux.

Reach us at info@symbolb.com
